membershipRules.question: How are renewals, upgrades, and downgrades handled?
membershipRules.answer:
Membership orders follow these rules:

1. Buying the same level extends your current expiration time
2. Buying a higher level takes effect immediately, and the remaining value of your current membership is converted into time on the new level
3. Buying a lower level does not downgrade you immediately. It is queued and will take effect after your current membership and any already queued memberships end

Tip: If you buy multiple future lower-level memberships in a row, they are activated in purchase order.

howConsume.question: How are credits consumed?
howConsume.answer:
When you create image or video tasks, the system deducts credits in this order:

1. Package credits are used first (starting with the earliest expiring package)
2. If the package's daily limit is reached, permanent credits are used
3. If all packages are insufficient, permanent credits make up the difference

Tip: Package credits are subject to daily limits, while permanent credits have no daily restrictions.

dailyLimitReached.question: What happens when the daily limit is reached?
dailyLimitReached.answer:
When a package's daily limit is exhausted, if you continue creating tasks, the system will automatically deduct from your permanent credits.

For example: If the package has a daily limit of 10 credits and you've used all 10 today, creating more tasks will deduct from permanent credits.

Tip: Permanent credits never expire, so you can use them with confidence.
